stories.title: On the World Cup's day of stars, Messi towers over Haaland and Mbappe
stories.summary: On a day when Kylian Mbappé and Erling Haaland excelled, Lionel Messi offered a timely reminder of his greatness.

stories.title: Messi ties Klose record with 16th World Cup goal
stories.summary: Lionel Messi made history Tuesday night by tying the record for most men's World Cup goals at 16 with Miroslav Klose after scoring a hat trick and staking Argentina to a 3-0 lead over Algeria before coming off late in the second half.

stories.title: Mbappé nets stunner, breaks France record in win
stories.summary: Kylian Mbappé moved ahead of Lionel Messi in the all-time World Cup scoring charts and became France's record goalscorer with two goals in Les Bleus' 3-1 Group I win against Senegal.

stories.title: Game 5 most-watched since 1998; peaked at 33M
stories.summary: The Knicks' 94-90 victory over the Spurs on Saturday night to capture their first NBA title in 53 years averaged 24.5 million viewers on ABC and ESPN, making it the most-watched Game 5 since 1998.

stories.title: Tortorella not returning as Golden Knights' coach
stories.summary: John Tortorella, who was hired with eight games left in the regular season and guided the Golden Knights to the Stanley Cup Final, will not return as coach next season.
